name: cc-conductor
description: cc-conductor — the conductor layer: the `ccconductorctl` console observes and controls many coding agents and musicians at once (token burn, stalls, loops, stop/steer), usable by a human in a terminal and by an external agent. Also carries the conductor brain (`/conduct`, the `conductor` skill): an autonomous product conductor that discovers a product's repos, reasons about cross-repo dependencies, sequences the work, and assigns musicians selectively.
